info.title: VAIF Studio API
info.description: Control-plane API for VAIF Studio. Public endpoints only.

List logs for a project

Rotate the refresh token and issue a new access token

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user's profile

get.summary: Check whether the current user has admin access
Get current user profile, org memberships, and admin status in one call

post.summary: Invalidate the current session and clear the refresh token cookie

Send a verification email to the current user's email address

get.summary: List enabled OAuth providers available for login or account linking
